subcodes.first_line: We have sent forth the Book in the form of man, and verily this mighty Book hath manifested Our Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد بعثنا الکتاب علی صوره الانسان و انه هذا الکتاب العظیم قد اظهرنا اسمنا
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action, @chastisement and requital, @consolation and comfort
